title: Damna Tui A Luanna-ah Ka Teeng Hi

sections.label: Chorus
lines: Ka teenna gam nuam nuntakna tui gei-ah,
“Damna tui a luanna ah ka teeng
hi;”
Ka teenna gam nuam nunna tui a luanna,
“Damna tui a luanna ah ka teeng hi.”

sections.label: Verse 1
lines: Israel mite tawh lungnuam takin ka paikhawm hi,
“Damna tui a luanna ah ka teeng
hi;”
A muanhuai meikhuam in ka paina ding lam hong laka,
“Damna tui a luanna ah ka
teeng hi.”

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: Tunglam pan a Manna hangin, ka gilkial nawn kei ding,
“Damna tui a luanna ah ka teeng
hi;”
Suangpi pan phul itna tui hangin dangtak nawn kei ning,
“Damna tui a luanna ah ka
teeng hi.”

sections.label: Verse 3
lines: Suakta zo ing, Hallelujah ci-in la ngaihsa ing,
“Damna tui a luanna ah ka teeng
hi;”
Ama kamciam muang in, A sisan hangin, suakta ing,
“Damna tui a luanna ah ka teeng
hi.”
